author: lOrm
content:
Deferred — requires unrestricted access to src/permissions.rs (FORBIDDEN under current cleanup scope).

**Fix outline:** At src/permissions.rs:155-169, change the dangerously_disable_sandbox handling from warn-and-fall-through to warn-and-explicitly-deny. The fix is two lines: replace the warn block with warn! { ... }; return CheckResult::Denied { reason: 'dangerously_disable_sandbox in tool args is not honored — must be set in user-level configuration only' }. Defense-in-depth: even if model-injected flags can never actually flip the sandbox (the loader only reads user config), denying the request deters the pattern and surfaces it in audit logs as a deny rather than a silent ignore.

**Blocking:** src/permissions.rs is reserved scope. Defer to a future unrestricted pass.
